name: chart/sunburst
description: Radial hierarchy — concentric rings where each node is an annular segment sized by value.

meta.name: Sunburst
meta.description: Radial hierarchy — concentric rings where each node is an annular segment sized by value.

props.name: data
props.description: Root of the tree; leaves carry value, parents sum their children.

props.name: tooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltips on hover.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

props.name: plain
props.description: When true, renders a minimal variant without chart chrome.

examples.title: Sunburst
examples.code:
import { Sunburst } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Sunburst
  title="Disk usage"
  data={{ label: 'root', children: [
    { label: 'src', children: [{ label: 'app', value: 40 }, { label: 'lib', value: 25 }] },
    { label: 'docs', value: 15 },
  ] }}
/>

whenToUse: Showing a part-of-whole hierarchy across multiple levels
A radial alternative to a Treemap for nested proportions
whenNotToUse: A flat set of proportions — use PieChart
Precise leaf comparison — use a Treemap or bars

related.name: Treemap
related.reason: Use the rectilinear layout for dense leaves

intent.a11yRationale: Renders role="img" with a title and a fallback path/value table.
